Ntc Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JANIK P. CATALANO OF THE CATALANO LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 633-6444 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS NICOLE KILLEN AND BRIAN KILLEN'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions AGAINST SHARRIANA RICE FLORER FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO COURT ORDER COMPELLING DISCOVERY; FOR ISSUE SANCTIONS IN THE ALTERNATIVE AND FOR MONETARY SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,750.00 - MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART. A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED IN OPEN COURT. No opposition was filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
